message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' define class Moveable
class Moveable {
    <<C>>
    - position: Position
    - state: 
    + {virtual} move(Direction)
    + back(Direction)
    + getPosition()
    + setPosition(const Position&)
}

' define class Player
class Player {
    <<C>>
    + move(Direction)
    + getPreviousDirection()
    + getPreviousPushFlag()
    + clear()
}

' define class Box
class Box {
    <<C>>
    - onTarget: bool
    + moveToTile(TileType)
    + getOnTarget()
}

' define class Map
class Map {
    <<C>>
    - width: int
    - height: int
    - tiles: TileMap
    - MovableList: vector
    - player: Player
    - Tile: OUT_SIDE_TILE
    # getTile()
    # moveBox()
    + getWidth()
    + getHeight()
    + initMap(const string&)
    + getStateOf(const Position&)
    + getBoxes()
    + getPlayerPosition()
    + back()
}

' define class Tile
class Tile {
    <<C>>
    - position: Position
    - type: TileType
    - flag: TileFlag
    + setPosition(const Position&)
    + getPosition()
    + setFlag(TileFlag)
    + getType()
    + getState()
}

' define class Position
class Position {
    <<C>>
    - x: int
    - y: int
    ~ DIRS
    + operator==(const Position&)
    + opeartor+=(const Position&)
    + getX()
    + getY()
    + of(int, int)
}

' define class Rule
class Rule {
    <<C>>
    + isWin(const Map&)
    + isRightMove(const Map&, Direction)
}

' define class Session
class Session {
    <<C>>
    - level
    - map
    - step
    - isFinish
    + move(Direction)
    + getMap()
    + finish()
    + isFinish()
    + getLevel()
    + backToPreviousPlace()
    + restart()
}

' define class FileUtil
class FileUtil {
    <<C>>
    + readFile()
}

' define class MapRepository
class MapRepository {
    <<C>>
    ~ MAP_PATH: string
    ~ MAP_DIR: string
    ~ MAP_ID: enum
    ~ MapBuffer: class
    + getMap(MAP_ID)
}

' define class Game
class Game {
    <<C>>
    - clock_t start
    - clock_t end
    - int curLevel
    - {const}int MAX_LEVEL
    - bool isFinish
    - bool isQuit
    - Session* curSession
    # handleCmd(char)
    # handleStartCmd(char)
    # initSession()
    # startSession()
    # endSession()
    + start()
    + isFinish()
    + getDuration()
}

' define interface Viewer
interface Viewer {
    <<I>>
    + getInput()
    + getLevel()
    + display()
}

' define enum State
enum State {
    <<E>>
    FLOOR_OUT_SIDE
    WALL
    FLOOR
    BOX
    TARGET
    PLAYER
    BOX_ON_TARGET
}

' define enum TileType
enum TileType {
    <<E>>
    WALL
    FLOOR
    TARGET
}

' define enum TileFlag
enum TileFlag {
    <<E>>
    NULL
    PLAYER
    BOX
}

' define enum Directory
enum Directory {
    <<E>>
    UP
    DOWN
    LEFT
    RIGHT
    SITU
}

' define relationships
Moveable <|-- Player
Moveable <|-- Box
Map *-- Player
Map *-- Box
Map *-- Tile
Tile *-- Position
Session *-- Map
Session *-- Rule
Game *-- Session
Game *-- MapRepository
Game *-- Viewer
MapRepository *-- FileUtil

@enduml
```
